edgeCases: Default surface = internal: no-surface brief and missing brief both resolve to internal (forward-only light path)
Internal docs step passes with only a one-line changelog and no knowledge-base bundle
Missing changelog rejected, naming the changelog file and remediation command
Blank/whitespace-only changelog rejected distinctly as empty, separate from the missing error
Merge-time portal regen is best-effort: seam invoked once on a clean merge; a regen error emits a notice and never fails the merge
Two hook nags are surface-aware: internal -> write-changelog/RenderChangelogNeeded; user-facing -> portal/RenderDocumentationNeeded
User-facing path byte-identical: portal + KB md + KB html still required; documentation-specialist role still demanded
Changelog artifact mechanically creatable: KindChangelog allowed and RenderTemplate emits a non-blank first line
Prompt-doc and scaffold mirror remain byte-identical (parity gate held)
